heading: Furnishing of records
label: 5702 Furnishing of records

Deadline; Establishment of Website or Online Tool, , , provided that:Pub. L. 118–21, § 2(c)137 Stat. 109Nov. 13, 2023“Not later than one year after the date of the enactment of this Act [], the Secretary of Veterans Affairs shall establish the website or online tool required under , United States Code, as added by this Act, and, to the extent practicable, the Secretary shall utilize existing online resources of the Department of Veterans Affairs for the purposes of such establishment.”Nov. 13, 2023section 5702(b)(1) of title 38

children.text: the particular record, paper, and so forth, a copy of which is desired and whether certified or uncertified;
the purpose for which such copy is desired to be used; and
the format in which such copy is desired, including whether in printed form or by downloadable file.

The Secretary shall establish and maintain a secure website or online tool for a claimant or a duly recognized agent or representative of that claimant to submit an electronic request for such records.

children.label: A
children.text: not later than 10 days after receipt, confirmation of such receipt; and

children.label: B
children.text: not later than 120 days after receipt, such records requested in the form selected by the requestor.

children.label: c
children.text: The Secretary may establish a schedule of fees for copies and certification of such records.
